label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library — Gemini cost estimate is now meaningfully more accurate. We capture the full usageMetadata from every call (prompt, candidates, cached, thoughts) and apply the right rate to each: cached input billed at ~25% of normal, Pro-model thinking billed as output. Token counts always came straight from Google's response and remain accurate; the cost is still an estimate (label updated to "est. cost" with a tooltip explaining the source).
Plant Library runs — track total cached and total thinking tokens per run so admins can see where the cost came from (lots of cache hits? a thinky Pro response?).
